text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm out buying things<n>in the
shopping district, I hear<n>someone laughing very
loudly.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: My sides! You are not gonnabelieve this!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: ...Bwahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wheeze! It's SOOO funny, I can'teven!
choice_data_list: Just take a moment to calm down.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh! Okay! I'm all pulled together!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: I was in the supermarket and, no cap,I saw a carrot that looked justlike Golshi's face when she yawns,and...

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Meooooow!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oh! A kitty?! Hold up... Ahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Its whiskers are lopsided!

text_block_list.name: Dog
text_block_list.text: Woof, woof!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: A puppy! Ahahaha! It's so adooorbs!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Oof, all thislaughing's no joke. My abs arecramping so much—I feel like just did fifty crunches.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, shoot! When did it get so late?! I<n>promised
someone I'd run with them!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios quickly dashes off<n>back to the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Bet. Lemme try to take some deep<n>breaths.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Haaah... Phewww...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Okay, time to imagine something<n>that'll calm me
down.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I know just the thing! I'll think of<n>President
Rudolf's speech...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Pfft... Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... Sorry. I justremembered the super cringe pun shemade, and—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her attempts to calm down<n>completely backfire,
and Daitaku<n>Helios ends up doubled over in<n>
endless laughter.
